seoTitle: Connect QuickBooks API to n8n: OAuth Setup Guide
metaDescription: Step-by-step guide to connecting QuickBooks Online to n8n, from creating an Intuit developer app to authorizing OAuth2 and syncing invoices.
intro: Connecting QuickBooks Online to n8n lets you automate financial data like invoices, customers, and transactions without manual exports. Because QuickBooks uses OAuth2, the setup involves both the Intuit Developer Portal and your n8n workspace. This guide covers the full authorization handshake so your automations can safely read and write accounting data.

steps.heading: Add the QuickBooks node in n8n
steps.body: Open a workflow canvas and add the official QuickBooks Online node to begin the integration.

steps.heading: Create a new credential and copy the redirect URL
steps.body: Start a new credential profile for QuickBooks in n8n and copy the OAuth redirect URL it generates.

steps.heading: Register an app in the Intuit Developer Portal
steps.body: Sign in to the Intuit Developer console and create a new application to represent your n8n integration.

steps.heading: Paste the redirect URI and generate keys
steps.body: Add your copied redirect URL into the app's Keys and OAuth settings, then generate your Client ID and Client Secret.

steps.heading: Complete the connection in n8n
steps.body: Paste the Client ID and Client Secret back into n8n, choose Sandbox or Production, and sign in with QuickBooks to finish authorization.

steps.heading: Run a test sync
steps.body: Trigger a manual execution to confirm your account connects and data flows correctly before automating further.

faq.question: Do I need a paid Intuit developer account?
faq.answer: No, creating a developer app in the Intuit Developer Portal to generate API keys is free; you just need an Intuit account.

faq.question: What's the difference between Sandbox and Production?
faq.answer: Sandbox uses test company data so you can build and verify your workflow safely, while Production connects to your real QuickBooks company file.

faq.question: Why does my OAuth connection keep failing?
faq.answer: This is usually caused by a mismatch between the redirect URL registered in the Intuit app and the one n8n generated — make sure they match exactly.

faq.question: Can I automate invoice creation with this integration?
faq.answer: Yes, once connected you can use the QuickBooks node to create, read, or update records like invoices and customers as part of a workflow.
